fun plan(): GateResult {
    val repositoryInstructions = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/AGENTS.md")
    val contextReadme = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/README.md")
    val contextIndex = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/index.md")
    val contextMaintenance = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/maintenance.md")
    val repoIndex = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/generated/repo_index.md")
    val engineeringPrinciples = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/modules/overview/engineering-principles.md")
    val selfVerificationPlaybook = readFile(path = "/home/runner/work/yuanrong-datasystem/yuanrong-datasystem/.repo_context/playbooks/upkeep/ai-self-verification.md")
    val adherenceCluster = readFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/preflight/adherence.json")
    val mmComplianceCluster = readFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/preflight/mm-compliance.json")
    val consistencyCluster = readFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/preflight/consistency.json")
    val securityCluster = readFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/preflight/security.json")
    val parsedAdherence = parseClusterReport(name = "adherence", report = adherenceCluster)
    val parsedMmCompliance = parseClusterReport(name = "mm-compliance", report = mmComplianceCluster)
    val parsedConsistency = parseClusterReport(name = "consistency", report = consistencyCluster)
    val parsedSecurity = parseClusterReport(name = "security", report = securityCluster)
    val repoPolicy = extractPreflightPolicy(repositoryInstructions, contextReadme, contextIndex, contextMaintenance, repoIndex, engineeringPrinciples, selfVerificationPlaybook)
    val clusterSet = combineClusterReports(parsedAdherence, parsedMmCompliance, parsedConsistency, parsedSecurity)
    val normalizedFindings = normalizeFindings(clusterSet, repoPolicy)
    val criticalFindings = selectBlockingFindings(normalizedFindings, severities = listOf("critical", "high"))
    val missingInputs = findMissingRequiredInputs(clusterSet, required = listOf("adherence", "mm-compliance", "consistency", "security"))
    val overrideSignals = readFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/preflight/override.json")
    val parsedOverride = parseOverrideRequest(overrideSignals)
    val verdict = decideGateVerdict(blockers = criticalFindings, missingInputs = missingInputs, override = parsedOverride)
    val verification = verifyGateDecision(verdict, normalizedFindings, repoPolicy)
    val report = renderGateReport(verdict, normalizedFindings, verification)
    writeFile(path = "/tmp/gh-aw/agent/preflight-gate-verdict.json", content = report)
    return makeGateResult(verdict, report)
}
